overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a soldier character exploring a tropical rural village with red dirt roads and simple concrete buildings. The character walks through the village center, enters a building with a yellow awning, traverses the interior, and continues along paved streets. The environment features palm trees, scattered NPCs, and mountainous terrain in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical village dirt road with palm trees

events.description: character passes two NPCs in blue shirts walking on the dirt road
approaches barricaded area with wrecked military vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red dirt road through the village outskirts

notable_agents.action: civilian in blue shirt walking along the dirt path

entered.detail: tall palm tree with thick trunk casting shadow on the dirt road
unfinished cinder block wall with rebar sticking out from the top
single-story yellow building with red roof tiles
destroyed military truck with sandbags and barricade walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide red dirt road lined with dense tropical vegetation and palm trees. Simple concrete block houses line the path, and a few NPC civilians in blue shirts are visible walking ahead. The character approaches a barricaded area with a wrecked military vehicle in the center of the village.

events.description: turns from dirt road onto paved concrete street
approaches entrance of building with yellow awning and striped rugs

agents.ego_description: turning onto the paved street and walking toward the market building entrance

entered.detail: single-story building with yellow fabric awning and open front entrance
concrete paved street with visible cracks and patches
simple wooden bench on the sidewalk near the market

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a paved concrete street, transitioning from the open dirt area to a more structured village street. A market building with a distinctive yellow awning comes into view ahead, with wooden benches and potted plants near the entrance. The surroundings become less vegetated and more built-up.

scene_state.functional_zone: market interior with rugs and shelves

events.description: enters the building through the open doorway, transitioning from outdoor to indoor
exits the building through the back doorway to the rear yard

agents.ego_description: entering the market building, walking across the rugs inside, and exiting to the backyard

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near crates outside the market entrance

entered.detail: dimly lit interior room with plaster walls and hanging light fixtures
colorful striped rugs covering the floor inside the building
wooden shelving units along the left wall with various goods

segments.scene_description: The character enters the market building through the open front entrance, transitioning from bright sunlight to a dimly lit interior. The room features colorful striped rugs on the floor, wooden shelves along the walls, and hanging light fixtures. The character walks through the room and exits through a back doorway into a rear yard area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear alley and backyard area between buildings

events.description: turns left around the corner of the building
returns to the paved street from the back alley

agents.ego_description: navigating the backyard area, passing wooden crates and barrels, then returning to the street

entered.detail: open dirt yard behind the market building with scattered debris and containers
stacked wooden crates and barrels in the backyard
pink two-story concrete building with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a rear backyard area with red dirt ground, wooden crates, and concrete walls. After exploring the narrow space between buildings, the character turns and walks back out to the paved street, passing a two-story pink building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: main village street with shops and pedestrians

events.description: encounters group of NPC pedestrians on the sidewalk
continues walking up the gently sloping street

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved village street, passing NPCs and market stalls

notable_agents.action: woman in green shirt and yellow pants walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: small market stall with blue painted walls and various goods displayed
mountain range visible in the background beyond the village
wooden utility pole with wires running across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the main paved street of the village, which slopes gently upward. The street is lined with colorful market stalls and two-story buildings. Several NPC pedestrians are visible walking along the sidewalks, and distant mountains are visible at the end of the street. The atmosphere is that of a busy rural village center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tropical village, transitioning from a wild, red-dirt periphery into a structured commercial center. It begins along a wide dirt road lined with dense palm trees and concrete houses, moving past civilians toward a barricaded area with a wrecked military vehicle. As the camera turns right, the terrain shifts from open earth to a paved concrete street, leading directly toward a market building marked by a distinctive yellow awning. The scene then moves from the bright sunlight into the dimly lit interior of the market, traversing a room of striped rugs and wooden shelves before exiting through a back doorway into a narrow backyard filled with crates. Finally, the camera emerges back onto the main paved street, passing a pink building and ascending a gentle slope lined with colorful stalls and pedestrians toward distant mountains.
